body.title: CLOSED: Add logging to 59 silent except blocks in wild_igor/igor/
body.result: 50 silent except blocks fixed across 22 files; 0 remaining in first-party code (ebook_drm/ skipped as third-party); 4478 tests pass
body.description:
Day-close audit (2026-05-05) found 59 bare except/pass or silent except blocks with no log call. Each needs at minimum a log.warning() so errors don't disappear silently.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/ — grep for bare except handlers
**Design rules:** no-bare-except-pass, docs-live-in-code
**Scope boundary:** Add log call to each silent except in wild_igor/igor/; no other changes. Skip blocks that have a deliberate comment explaining why silence is correct.
**Test plan:** Run audit scan after — zero bare-except-pass findings expected. Existing tests must still pass.
